programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo try to foil a showdown at the Mucky Duck Saloon when Robin and loud Irishman Mick get into an argument. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A mysterious delivery causes Poirot to recall the time his supper at a Buenos Aires restaurant was rudely interrupted by the murder of a fellow diner, who unwittingly drank from a glass laced with cyanide. Drama, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Steve Crane takes an urgent phone call, and is shocked to discover Peter Pyke's warehouse has gone up in smoke. It soon emerges that the owner's wife had spent time behind bars for fraud, and her husband is reluctant to answer questions - leading Merton to suspect the blaze was deliberate. Meanwhile, Vernon moves into his new mansion, but has trouble keeping up with his well-to-do neighbours. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: A rejection forces Turner to reconsider. Pollard considers an opportunity. Zoe comes out with some news and there's an unwelcome face in The Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Turner's attempt to save face is ill-advised, while Jack's advice gives Leonard food for thought. Elizabeth and Pollard have an unpleasant encounter(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin receives a date for his court case. Andy receives a shock when he goes to meet Amy at the airport. Vera announces she's spending her winnings on Joss's funeral(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz is delighted to hear Amy isn't coming back. Steve looks after Andy when he gets drunk. Curly is surprised when Elaine agrees to have dinner with him(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prominent resident is robbed and battered to death with her walking stick, and suspicion soon falls on the members of her reading club - which turns out to be a front for a lucrative investment portfolio. John Nettles and Daniel Casey star, with guest appearances by Anton Rodgers (Fresh Fields) and Angela Thorne (To the Manor Born)(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Steve Crane takes an urgent phone call, and is shocked to discover Peter Pyke's warehouse has gone up in smoke. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth is called to Gossington Hall by her old friend Dolly Bantry (Joanna Lumley) when she finds the corpse of an unknown blonde in the library of her home. It soon transpires that there is no shortage of suspects, including local bad boy Basil Blake (Ben Miller) and Dolly's husband Arthur (James Fox), but when the victim is identified as a dancer in line to inherit a fortune, enquiries take a different turn. Crime drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Simon Callow, Jack Davenport and Tara Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks(n)

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Sylvia Kay guests as an agony aunt who receives a letter from a hospital patient - but her reply to the poor chap causes confusion on the ward(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon finds himself teetering between two women racing drivers - who are rivals in love as well as on the track. Adventure, guest starring Kate O'Mara(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A detective makes an arrest while off duty to give himself an alibi while he kills his wife's lover. But he ends up having to investigate his own murder alongside a suspicious Theo(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A youth is arrested for the murder of a City Hall secretary, but Quincy is convinced he lacks the physical strength to have carried out such a horrific crime(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's niece is set to be married and he has agreed to supply the wedding limousine - but her big day is placed in jeopardy when he finds he also needs the vehicle to shift a consignment of pornographic magazines. Warren Clarke guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Carter's wife Alison is targeted by a hit-and-run driver while performing a routine errand on his behalf. programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Gregg Wallace, Denise Lewis, Mark Pougatch and Gina Yashere pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at a company manufacturing the hand-sewn Union Jacks seen flying over Buckingham Palace, and a Devon forge that produces wood burning stoves. Plus, an insight into the creation of handmade marbles and the secret recipe of a British kitchen cupboard staple dating back almost 200 years. Ricky Tomlinson narrates(n)

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: A reprogrammed killing machine is sent back in time to the 20th century to protect John Connor, a teenage boy whose destiny is to save the human race. After breaking John's mother out of a mental institution, the pair set out to avert a future nuclear war - pursued by an advanced prototype terminator with shape-changing powers. Sci-fi action adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong and Robert Patrick(n)

programme.desc: The pair load their bikes on to the Paddington-Penzance sleeper train, and after taking a ferry across the Celtic sea, head to the Isles of Scilly. The next morning, George discovers the delights of Tresco Abbey Gardens, a world-famous botanical garden, while Larry helps deliver the mail with one of the UK's last cycling posties. programme.desc: The former Pontins bluecoat takes on a mission to persuade friends, family and the great British public about the great fun to be had at caravan parks in Britain. Here, the actor and presenter heads to Rhyl, north Wales, where he and his extended family accept accommodation in three static caravans. The EastEnders star then tries to win them all over to this type of holiday, highlighting attractions such as classic bingo at the entertainment complex and rounders on the beach. They then visit Blaenau Ffestiniog to zipline over a slate quarry, where even the grandparents take on the challenge(n)

programme.title: Three Faces West (1940)

The daughter falls for the pioneer leading the journey, despite being engaged to the man who helped her escape the Third Reich. Drama, starring John Wayne, Charles Coburn and Sigrid Gurie(n)

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)

When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Below (1957)
programme.desc: The captain of an American destroyer in the South Atlantic is still recovering from the sinking of his previous vessel. He tries to outwit a cunning German U-boat commander, but comes to respect the courage of his enemy. However, his crew fears he is not up to the challenge of defeating his opponent. Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: The Bank Job (2008)
programme.desc: A London car dealer is persuaded by an old flame to rob a bank. The heist goes off without a hitch, leaving the crooks in possession of cash and jewels worth millions - as well as a safety deposit box containing top-secret information the government and security services are determined to keep buried. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Jason Statham and Saffron Burrows(n)

programme.title: In Bruges (2008)
programme.desc: Two hitmen are ordered to lie low in Belgium after an assignment goes tragically wrong. Trying to pass themselves off as ordinary tourists in the medieval city of Bruges, the bickering duo get caught up in a string of surreal misadventures - and then they learn the real and sinister reason why their unstable boss sent them there in the first place. Comedy drama, starring Colin Farrell, Brendan Gleeson, Ralph Fiennes and Clemence Poesy(n)

programme.title: Thanks for Sharing (2012)
programme.desc: Three men at different stages of dealing with sex addiction also have to wrestle with issues in their love lives. Adam is afraid to start a new relationship for fear of losing control, Mike's need for order in his life puts a strain on his family, and Neil is forced to stop denying he has a problem by a new friend. Comedy drama, starring Mark Ruffalo, Tim Robbins, Josh Gad and Gwyneth Paltrow(n)

programme.title: Vertigo (1958)
programme.desc: A private eye with an aversion to heights is hired to trail the wife of an old college friend because of her strange and inconsistent behaviour. However, he soon falls obsessively in love with her, and is drawn into a complex and destructive mystery. Alfred Hitchcock's thriller, starring Kim Novak in a dual role alongside James Stewart, Barbara Bel Geddes and Tom Helmore(n)

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero(n)

programme.title: McLintock! (1963)
programme.desc: A hard-drinking cattle baron is determined to stop events spiralling out of control when his estranged wife turns up demanding a divorce. Meanwhile, an ardent suitor is pursuing his flighty daughter, and corrupt government agents are turning a blind eye to land grabbers. Comedy Western, starring John Wayne, Maureen O'Hara, Yvonne de Carlo, Patrick Wayne and Stefanie Powers(n)

programme.title: Transcendence (2014)
programme.desc: A scientist working to develop artificial intelligence is assassinated, but his death provides the breakthrough he and his colleagues needed, as his own mind is uploaded into a computer system. Granted extraordinary knowledge, he begins planning to change the world for the better - with potentially horrific consequences for the human race. Sci-fi drama, starring Johnny Depp, Rebecca Hall and Morgan Freeman(n)

Comedy, starring Sheridan Smith, Kate Nash, Jaime Winstone and Oona Chaplin(n)

programme.title: The Last Frontier (1955)

On taking over command of the garrison, the officer plans to lead his men in a reckless attack on a hostile Indian tribe - and it is down to the frontiersman to save his comrades from a massacre. Western, starring Victor Mature, Robert Preston and Anne Bancroft(n)

Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly has difficulty accepting her son has such deep emotions at his tender age. Problems ensue when Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch American football with Lainey's father. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray takes Erica's car privileges away, she and Barry buy a shabby second-hand van to get back at him. Meanwhile, when Adam objects to being voted 'nicest guy' in the school yearbook, he gets a suspension(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Now that he's officially back at the precinct and desperate to solve a real criminal case, Peralta finds a loophole to get out of his temporarily designated desk duty. Unfortunately, that loophole rests on his ability to pass an official evaluation performed by Captain Holt. While Boyle provides Peralta with moral support, Jeffords and Santiago help Diaz, who believes Pimento may be cheating on her(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct embarks on its fifth annual Halloween Heist and, as usual, everybody has a plan and no one is safe. Relationships and friendships are tested in the competition to win a spectacular championship belt and the title 'Amazing Human Slash Genius' by midnight, leaving all the members of the squad pitted against one another(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is driven to distraction when a tune becomes stuck in his head, while Amy and Dave arrange another date and Howard and Raj discover their band has a fan, but tracking him down turns out to be a mistake. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After more than five years of dating, Sheldon and Amy spend their first night together, while Leonard, Howard and Raj must decide who will take their extra Star Wars movie ticket. Plus, Sheldon's Obi-Wan advises him on his difficult relationship decisions. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with recurring guest star Bob Newhart(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Carl begins to get jealous of the amount of time Mike is spending with Molly, so the lovestruck policeman agrees to let him go with them on a double date(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: When Mike invites Molly over to his apartment, his plans for a romantic evening are interrupted by a call from his mother(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Jimmy is upset that the kids no longer want to participate in the family tradition of dressing up for Halloween, so Maya tries to cheer him up by allowing him to do things he loves. Meanwhile, Ray recruits Dylan to help run the school's haunted mansion(n)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: JJ gets a crush on a new girl at school, Ray gains hero status with the boys by making inaccurate claims about a photo on his mobile and Jimmy teaches Dylan how to deal with stress(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is called upon to negotiate a hostage situation with a jewel thief, only to discover that the culprit is a familiar face. Santiago and Gina help Boyle with the demands of his new food truck business, and Holt panics when a member of the selection committee for the Police Commissioner post decides to interview Hitchcock(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta prepares for an all-night interrogation in the hope of securing a confession from a stubborn suspect. However, when Captain Holt sacrifices an evening at the opera to stay behind at the precinct and help, the two officers clash over how to make the man talk. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hoping that Pops' good luck can rub off on him, Adam takes to gambling at school - but ends up losing his toys. Erica wants to take part in a popular TV dance show, but when she gets the chance her dream quickly turns into a nightmare(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Beverly decide to create a music video to help Erica's application to Julliard stand out, but the production does not go as planned. When Murray bonds with Lainey's father Bill, he learns what it means to be a real friend. Tim Meadows and David Koechner guest star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: On a weekend cabin trip with Penny and Amy, Sheldon spills one of Leonard's secrets, while Howard and Bernadette must draw a line when Raj goes overboard with pregnancy gifts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Marnie turns up at the Maaliks to talk to Romeo and wants him to give James one more chance. Elsewhere, Luke sets up a party in The Love Boat(n)

programme.desc: The group of famous faces arrive in France. In Nice, the celebrities are put through their paces at a beach boot camp, before an afternoon of flyboarding(n)

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Post-apocalyptic drama set 97 years after nuclear Armageddon decimated Earth. Clarke has to fight for her life when she finds herself trapped(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette(n)

programme.title: Krypton

Legal secretary Anna is matched with male stripper Junior - although she has a different type of dance in mind - Italian locksmith Roberto meets Croation nanny Aleksandra, and Cameron and Louise look like the perfect match - but they've both been hurt in love and have their defences up(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel receives unexpected news that could have a direct impact on her attempt to run for a senate seat. Ryder receives his orders from the US Navy, and a car crash gives Lenin and Zander a new outlook on life. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Danny and Ben are eager to find out the gender of Riley's baby, even though she would prefer it to be a surprise, but their quest creates a series of mix-ups. Riley fights for Brad's freedom in his final trial, and Tucker auditions to appear in a new courtroom reality series(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself(n)

programme.desc: Inspired by the film Ferris Bueller's Day Off, Barry pretends to be ill so that he can avoid school and create an epic day of his own. However, his plans go awry when Adam has exactly the same idea. Charlie Sheen guest stars(n)

Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big Risky Business-inspired party at Lainey's house while her father is out of town. programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star(n)

programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago try to get their parents to bond over Thanksgiving dinner, but their first holiday together as a family doesn't go well. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero, with guest appearances from Jimmy Smits and Katey Sagal(n)

Comedy, guest starring June Squibb(n)

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Trouble brews for the Chicago couple when Mike downplays his relationship with Molly in front of a woman who is flirting with him(n)

programme.desc: When Mike's mother Peggy buys Molly a new hat as a gesture of goodwill, Molly feels obliged to invite her to spend Thanksgiving with her family(n)

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: As Christmas arrives, Maya surprises everyone by embracing a new-found holiday spirit. However, her mood is put to the test when the family's van is stolen, along with all their holiday gifts. Worried that he won't get into college, Ray tries to enhance his CV by joining the school choir. He is given a coveted solo spot but faces competition from JJ(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta invites his newly discovered half-sister Kate (New Girl star Nasim Pedrad) to come and stay with him in New York. However, when he and Santiago realise she's a bit of a nightmare, they must find a way to get her back home to Dallas as fast as possible(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a fire destroys Boyle's food truck, Pimento unexpectedly shows up at the scene, working as an insurance investigator. Diaz helps Santiago to see that it's fine to get excited about picking her wedding dress, while Gina and Jeffords coach Captain Holt in the art of social media. Comedy, starring Joe Lo Truglio and Jason Mantzoukas(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to help Adam navigate a painless path through puberty, but just as his voice is changing, he is cast in the lead role of the school musical. Determined to help him survive the performance, Beverly decides lip-synching might be the answer. Meanwhile, Murray is irked when Erica chooses musician Johnny over Barry's sidekick Geoff as her date for the homecoming dance(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry accidentally records over one of Beverly's prized family videotapes - her treasured keepsake from his fifth birthday party. Meanwhile, Adam and Murray build a robot together, but the project comes between them when they experience creative differences(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Conflict arises when Leonard's newly divorced parents and Sheldon's devoutly religious mother are all in town at the same time. And when Howard and Raj are contacted about the guidance system they've developed, they assume that the government is out to get them. Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret(n)

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues (2013)
programme.desc: Arrogant newsreader Ron Burgundy's career is rescued from a drunken slump by an executive for a new 24-hour news channel. Reassembling his team of sidekicks, he swiftly rises from the network's graveyard to become its biggest star with a run of ludicrously sensationalist broadcasts. However, everything goes awry when the potion combines with the influenza virus and mutates it, leaving Rick in a race against time to find an antidote(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi shows Essex-born Jackie and her Portuguese partner Hilario a selection of properties that fall within their £62,000 budget in the Eastern Algarve, where the couple want to buy their dream holiday home(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Jane Dean and her daughter Laura, who are ready for a fresh start in a new location. Jane is keen to relocate to the Central Algarve region of Portugal, and has a budget of £189,000 to spend on the perfect home for the two of them(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker help retiree John and insurance broker Sharyn. Their four-bedroom home in St Ives Chase, New South Wales, is rambling and dated. Sharyn wants to release the capital for a fresh move, but change-resistant John is determined to stay put(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge visits Ben and Billie to help restore Ben's traditional wine press, and Johnny and Ashley finish off their work on the library ceiling(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter Dale Harvey hosts the first dinner party in Derby, where he hopes to impress aspiring thespian Beth Dunmore, business support manager Jo-Anna, mother-of-three Ondine Shardlow, and triathlete David Morris with a wrestling-themed extravaganza featuring large men in tight lycra. However, a fractious royal debate dampens the mood(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business support manager Jo-Anna hosts the second dinner party in Derby, and hopes to wow her guests with a glitz and glam evening - complete with ball gowns and poetry. However, David is hoping for a more lively night - and his antics do not impress fellow contestant Dale(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR whizz Beth Dunmore hosts the third night in Derby, and she hopes to impress her guests with her vaguely Middle Eastern menu. However, she has her work cut out when it comes to the fussy David Morris, whose confidence seems to be growing as the week progresses. Beth has a fan in cruise ship connoisseur Jo-Anna, though, while single mum Ondine Shardlow is disappointed with the level of competition and thinks she has the week in the bag(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ondine Shardlow hosts the fourth dinner party in Derby, hoping to impress her guests with a flavoursome Greek holiday-inspired menu. However, her carefully planned evening takes a turn for the worse when she manages to insult Dale, and Jo-Anna displays some questionable table manners(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the dinner party contest in Derby and the turn of triathlete David Morris to serve his offerings. Ondine is not impressed by his small portions, big flavours approach, and is even less satisfied with Jo-Anna's behaviour during the week. The host throws an impromptu work-out class where wrestling promoter Dale Harvey is put through his paces, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hanger of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow Chester Zoo's four new fledgling Humboldt penguins who are being brought up apart from the main colony until they're old enough to compete for fish in the main pool. They're keen to make a break for it and join the adults, but when they're finally free to go they have other ideas. Elsewhere, Niall the chimpanzee keeper has known chimp Boris for 44 years. When the ape captures a moorhen chick, Niall must use his powers of persuasion to negotiate the safe release of his hostage(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Bengal cat called Tia is rushed in to Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a car. Noel Fitzpatrick faces the painstakingly difficult task of reconstructing Tia's tiny bones using a combination of rods and pins. Whippet Wobble, a rescue dog, is so badly injured that Noel has no choice but to perform a high-risk operation, and Alfie, a labrador care-dog, arrives at the surgery in need of help with elbow dysplasia(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows Sarah and Dean Berry, who returned to live in their home town of Newport, Gwent, after 17 years in London. The couple have bought an 18th-century folly - a castle perched on a hilltop - and plan to restore the building to its former glory, while also wrapping a large modern extension around the original structure(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: Prince George makes a love match and marries the glamorous Princess Marina of Greece and Denmark, while Henry gives up the married Beryl Markham and also makes a suitable marriage. Edward, meanwhile, brings married American divorcee Wallis Simpson to George and Marina's pre-wedding party at Buckingham Palace, scandalising his parents. Not long after George V's Silver Jubilee celebrations, a unifying event for the nation, the King dies and Edward inherits the throne(n)

programme.title: Spying on the Royals
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary examining an espionage operation conducted to gather information on Edward VIII and Wallis Simpson. Shown to mark the 80th anniversary of the king's abdication, the programmes examines recently declassified documents revealing the extent of the surveillance and who ordered it, as well as featuring dramatic reconstructions and eyewitness accounts(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eighty-four-year-old Paula is referred to St George's for urgent treatment, after a routine blood test detected that she has a dangerously high level of potassium in her blood. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Derek is brought into A&E after suffering a suspected stroke. As he goes for emergency surgery, his devoted wife Mary is determined to help him recover. Plus, 31-year-old fireman Glenn arrives with a suspected abscess in his throat; he is joined by his twin brother Dean, and the pair prove to be inseparable(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy version of the quiz. Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by Peep Show star David Mitchell and stand-up comedienne Roisin Conaty. Phill Jupitus is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Joe Wilkinson 'helps' Rachel Riley with the letters and numbers(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow Chester Zoo's four new fledgling Humboldt penguins who are being brought up apart from the main colony until they're old enough to compete for fish in the main pool. They're keen to make a break for it and join the adults, but when they're finally free to go they have other ideas. Elsewhere, Niall the chimpanzee keeper has known chimp Boris for 44 years. When the ape captures a moorhen chick, Niall must use his powers of persuasion to negotiate the safe release of his hostage(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Bengal cat called Tia is rushed in to Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a car. Noel Fitzpatrick faces the painstakingly difficult task of reconstructing Tia's tiny bones using a combination of rods and pins. Whippet Wobble, a rescue dog, is so badly injured that Noel has no choice but to perform a high-risk operation, and Alfie, a labrador care-dog, arrives at the surgery in need of help with elbow dysplasia(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to Japan on the trail of tofu, wondering how green soy beans are turned into something so white and creamy. Jimmy Doherty investigates reports that supermarket ready meals have nearly doubled in size since the 1950s. He tracks down the ready meals of his childhood and discovers whether bigger plate sizes could also be causing people to eat more. Plus, in Wales, Matt Tebbutt looks into a new kind of milk, which it is claimed is easier to digest(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps sisters Annabel and Victoria, who have a budget of £100,000, to find an accessible apartment on the Costa del Sol, where their parents once owned a holiday home(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Irene Evans search for a home in western Andalusia, Spain, within commuting distance of Gibraltar, where she hopes to find work as a paralegal. She has decided to leave the UK after a tumultuous few years and has a budget of £90,000(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker help a family of nine in Canterbury, New South Wales, decide whether to renovate their current bungalow or look for a new home(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie host Sam Brown's Ukulele Orchestra in their ballroom and show her their new music studio. Wendy and Marcus launch their wedding business with a raucous hen party(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition heads to Manchester, where battling it out for the £1,000 cash prize are part-time DJ Dom, 35-year old barber Danny, trainee barrister Sasha, nurse Katherine and goth Maria. In the first edition, DJ Dom kicks off the week serving up a menu inspired by the 1990s 'Madchester' music scene(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee barrister Sasha hosts the second night in Manchester, where she hopes to impress her guests with a Chinese-Pakistani fusion menu. Meanwhile, fellow contestant Maria reveals more about her love of gothic culture, and Danny discusses his soon-to-be-written autobiography(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse Katherine hosts the third dinner party in Manchester, and she opts for a simple menu of a smoked salmon with horseradish cream starter, and a chorizo and chickpea main course. At the table, direct questioning and some extraordinary revelations cause some of the guests to feel uncomfortable(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Danny hosts the fourth night of the competition in Manchester, and decides on an evening of Bulgarian cuisine as a homage to his wife. His party ends with some Bulgarian language lessons that bemuse fellow diners Dom and Maria(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final night in Manchester and glamorous goth Maria is hoping to wow her guests with her twist on Asian cuisine. Some of the guests are feeling a little uneasy that the host will impart her love of vampire culture upon her menu, but the blood-free dishes even manage to impress daddy's girl Sasha. However, an avant-garde transgender dancer creates a stir, and at one point it seems possible that Maria has bitten off more than she can chew(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole builds a steampunk lamp from a copper electric central heating pipe and Simon O'Brien modernises a dated Welsh dresser during visits to Whitby and Shipley in Yorkshire(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With numbers in the wild dwindling rapidly, Chester Zoo's black rhino breeding programme is a key part of preserving the species. Black rhino Kitani is introduced to new mate Magadi, but with injury a high risk during mating, keeper Babs is concerned that Kitani may struggle to defend herself, since she lost her horn after the death of her calf. Meanwhile, there's a surprise birth in the orangutan house, and older sibling Tuti has to fend for herself and set out on the road to independence(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team's first patient is a West Highland terrier puppy that has a problem with its paws. Two new bionic feet later, and the poorly dog has a new lease of life. A young husky collie is also brought in after being hit by a car, only for the hip replacement operation to run into trouble, and a lazy dachshund requires double surgery and lots of physiotherapy(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of self-made property developer Barry Surtees and his wife Julie as they try to build a four-storey mansion in Brighton, complete with pool, gym, artist's studio, fantasy bedroom and Japanese roof garden. The project is not without its difficulties as the cost of materials escalates, neighbours become unhappy about the house dwarfing the rest of the street, and Barry undergoes triple heart-bypass surgery(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max volunteers New Amsterdam to take over for a short-staffed neighbouring hospital, Frome has a crisis of conscience, and an eager resident learns a secret about Bloom(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Keen young rugby player Robert has a dangerously high heart rate and may need to have a pacemaker fitted - a scary thought for the nine-year-old's father. Mark, 32, has fallen 30ft from scaffolding while doing some DIY, and there's concern he may have damaged his spine. Christine, 74, arrives in A&E after an accident in her garden, and she's suffered nasty injuries to her face(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: PC Greg Greaves calls for back-up in Crewe after two suspects shout claims of abuse and racism at him, and in Warrington, paramedic Becki arrives at the home of Marika, a Latvian woman who has been mugged in the street and left with a black eye. Meanwhile, PC Niaz Waddington and his colleagues keep a close eye on Saturday night revellers as the number of racially aggravated incidents dealt with by Cheshire Police on a typical weekend has doubled in the past five years(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max volunteers New Amsterdam to take over for a short-staffed neighbouring hospital, Frome has a crisis of conscience, and an eager resident learns a secret about Bloom(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With numbers in the wild dwindling rapidly, Chester Zoo's black rhino breeding programme is a key part of preserving the species. Black rhino Kitani is introduced to new mate Magadi, but with injury a high risk during mating, keeper Babs is concerned that Kitani may struggle to defend herself, since she lost her horn after the death of her calf. Meanwhile, there's a surprise birth in the orangutan house, and older sibling Tuti has to fend for herself and set out on the road to independence(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Ecuador to investigate claims that bananas could one day be used in the fight against a number of viruses including HIV and influenza. Kate Quilton goes in search of a meat substitute that delivers its promise on the tastebuds, visiting the Netherlands where a product called 'plant meat' has been developed by scientists. Plus, Matt Tebbutt visits one of Britain's largest crisp manufacturers to witness the high-tech machinery used to maintain standards of quality(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps find a suitable property for Mark and Wendy Lang, a couple from Liverpool with a £90,000 budget who want to start a new life on Spain's Costa Almeria(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Presenter Sara Damergi helps Chris Grandison and his grandmother Patricia Blythe search for a holiday home in Malta. Patricia and her late husband lived on the island many years ago when he served in the Armed Forces, and her grandson hopes to find a property with rental potential on a budget of £70,000(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: When newlyweds Kieran and Riley bought their two-bedroom terrace in Sydney's inner-city suburb of Paddington, they thought they'd hit the jackpot. However, now Riley's thoughts are turning to the future and a more family friendly home. Real estate expert Andrew Winter and interior design guru Neale Whitaker offer their thoughts and support(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Nicole and Stefan continue their renovation of their historic chateau in Lucheux, as Stefan uncovers a fireplace and tries to discover where an arrow slit is situated so he can create a window. Ben and Billie host their foodie evening with a pop-up restaurant in their orangery(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The culinary contest arrives in Hull as five more diners hope to claim the grand prize of £1,000. The first to host a party this week is 29-year-old welfare team leader Jennie, who decides to honour her home city's fishing history with an under-the-sea themed dinner. However, her guests prove to be a lively bunch, twerking their way through dinner, and throwing in a few seal impressions along the way(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter and novice cook James hosts the second night in Hull, and he hopes to wow his guests with a Mexican-themed party complete with a wrestling match as the evening's entertainment. However, his costume requirements, and his spicy food, may be too much for some of the attendees(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding stationery entrepreneur Katrena hosts the third dinner party in Hull, and hopes to impress her guests with a cruise-ship-themed night featuring a pink strawberry soup starter, a sparkling lemon iceberg dessert and towel-folding entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mum-of-three Natalie hopes that her choice of good quality produce can help her to impress her guests on the fourth night of the competition in Hull, East Yorkshire. However, the evening does not get off to the best start when community manager George wrongly guesses that she is the grandmother of her two-year-old daughter, and entrepreneur Katrena is insulted by one of the host's questions(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party in Hull and the turn of community manager George to entertain the guests. Having spent the week heavily criticising everyone else's cooking, the host faces great scrutiny with his menu of simple yet tasty favourites. It remains to be seen whether his egg drop soup and flambeed crepes Suzettes live up to expectations, before the winner of the cash prize is revealed(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a military vehicle enthusiast, where Henry mirror polishes a decommissioned missile and Simon repurposes a tank turret(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Florence and Nadine, two of Chester's Grevy's zebras, are about to give birth, but other animals are struggling to produce offspring, including Iblis the Asiatic lion. Meanwhile, warthog dad Magnum is feeling the pressure of parenting as two of his older children, Dobby and Neville, are becoming increasingly hard to control, and Magnum is losing his hair with the stress(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick gets to work on more animals in need of his help. A puppy is rushed into the surgery after being hit by a car, leading to a series of operations including a skin graft in which the dog's leg is sewn into her stomach. A Great Dane requires high-risk surgery after being diagnosed with a cancerous tumour in its leg, and a Chihuahua has shattered the bones in its paw falling down the stairs while chasing a cat. Can the professor help?(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud looks at the transformation of a derelict mill cottage in Northumberland into a contemporary family home, the longest-running project ever featured on the programme. Stefan Lepkowski and Ania Shabowska began work in 2006, and their ambitious plans involved restoring the Georgian building, reconstructing a watermill and adding a steel-and-glass atrium, but their budget of £250,000 was completely inadequate(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Two-and-a-half years have passed since Dick and Angel Strawbridge swapped their flat in Southend for a 19th-century chateau in France costing only £280,000, and in that time, the pair have worked to transform the derelict property into a fairytale castle. However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion(n)

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: A university mathematics professor is found dead in a tunnel inhabited by a homeless man in Valentino Park. Strange formulae are discovered written on the walls of the structure and Valeria feels that their presence is not a coincidence. Miriam Leone stars. In Italian(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. She's sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson takes the BMW M5 for a spin to give his opinions on the model, and the presenters get dangerous as they try Russian roulette road-testing, in which they turn chauffeur for supposedly drunk drivers, reviewing their passenger's car in the process of taking them home. There is a debate about the merits of three hatchbacks - the Renault Megane, Vauxhall Astra VXR and Volkswagen Golf GTi - and broadcaster Chris Evans is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys stumble on a mountain of motorbikes. However, as they soon discover, getting to them is going to be far from easy(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Heavy D, Nat, John, Linda and the rest of the bidders are in Southampton trying to outbid each other. Sean Kelly hosts(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees bidders in Lewes battling to win potential treasures found in storage containers, lock-ups and garages(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and the team face more challenges in the form of two vintage Harley-Davidson motorcycles which are pursued in Pennsylvania(n)

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of the Staffordshire Police force, revealing what makes its officers tick, how they deal with the tragedies they inevitably have to face and how much they rely on each other and also their camaraderie(n)

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the world's fastest driverless car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team takes a look at off-road models and test-drives the Bentley Flying Spur. There is also an attempt to drive a Jeep across a lake, a comparison of petrol and diesel-fuelled BMW 5 series vehicles, and Davina McCall is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: Officers are called upon to restrain a man having a bad reaction to the 'zombie' drug Black Mamba. Cutting-edge documentary following the work of the Staffordshire Police force(n)

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar
programme.desc: Pro driver Shane Lynch takes on engineer Ralph Hosier and his teams of mechanics, who are aiming to prove a supercar can be beaten by homemade scrap. This time, they get down and dirty in an off-road scramble versus the Bentley Bentayga - can a car synonymous with class and style be beaten by cars made from cast-offs?(n)

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve and a team of kayakers head to the Himalayas to visit the last great unexplored river in Bhutan. Legend has it that at some point, the river drops off the face of the planet(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team sets out to discover if driving a Lamborghini Murcielago roadster gives drivers the same kick as 12 angry bulls, and whether the Top Gear theme tune can be played with engines. The Ford F150 SVT Lightning pick-up is put through its paces, the world's greatest power sliders hit the track, and Timothy Spall is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take a continental trip in their favourite supercars - the Ford GT, Ferrari F430 and Pagani Zonda. There is a culture clash when the Austin Healey Sprite and Peugeot 306 go head to head, and the Focus ST is put through its paces on the track. Then-transport minister Stephen Ladyman drives the Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Bill Bailey, Katherine Ryan and Rhod Gilbert join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig for an extended edition of the comedy quiz show. This time, Sandi turns attention to topics on the theme of 'Operations'. During the course of the show, the panellists find out how to turn a muffin into an offensive weapon. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct(n)

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Extended edition. Comedian, writer and actress Katherine Ryan guest hosts the satirical quiz, with stand-up Joe Wilkinson and broadcaster and writer Gyles Brandreth joining regular team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to poke fun at the week's news(n)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The competitors are lured to a wasteland for a challenge involving eggs and medical equipment. David Baddiel spray-paints his face and Jo Brand reveals her psychic superpowers(n)

programme.title: Comedians Giving Lectures
programme.desc: Comedians Desiree Burch, Chris Ramsey and Lost Voice Guy are given the titles of real lectures and invited to give their own version. Presented by Sara Pascoe(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Frank Skinner invites comedian Alex Brooker, journalist Jeremy Paxman and actress Sally Phillips to express their anger over individuals, events and objects that upset them, hoping to curry the host's favour and see them consigned to oblivion. Their gripes include positive thinking, tourist attractions and former prime minister David Cameron(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Guests Jeremy Clarkson, Vic Reeves and Clive Anderson join regular contributor Alan Davies and host Stephen Fry in the quiz show with a difference. Coming under discussion is the ambitious 'E' subject - everything, with the questions so difficult that points are awarded for the most interesting answers(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regulars Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons are joined by Rob Beckett, Gary Delaney, Sara Pascoe and Romesh Ranganathan for the topical comedy quiz. The panellists give their take on the week's major news stories and participate in a series of stand-up spots and improvised games. First aired in 2014(n)

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Extended edition. Comedian, writer and actress Katherine Ryan guest hosts the satirical quiz, with stand-up Joe Wilkinson and broadcaster and writer Gyles Brandreth joining regular team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to poke fun at the week's news(n)

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Lenny Henry hosts another session of stand-up, warming up the audience at Hammersmith Apollo in London, before Mock the Week regulars Andy Parsons and Ed Byrne take turns to grab the mic, each sharing their views on life, the universe and whatever else takes their fancy(n)

programme.title: Judge Romesh
programme.desc: A spurned spouse tries to get access to his dog-obsessed wife, and a sword swallower tries to resolve his issues with a blindfolded fire juggler(n)

programme.title: Judge Romesh
programme.desc: A singer attempts to give her former band member the elbow, and a ghost hunter is the target of a £3,000 claim from a former boss(n)

programme.title: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: Gendle and Tim are dropped into a downhill bike park and create a human marble run using motorbikes and riders wearing zorbs(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank discover a huge and rare collection with enough items to fill a museum, but struggle to agree on a price for a set that is essentially priceless(n)

programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees UK bidders battling to win potential treasures found in storage containers, lock-ups and garages(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank continue their search for abandoned treasures. But when they bump into hard negotiator Big Moe, Mike is left feeling very small(n)

programme.desc: Officers are called upon to restrain a man having a bad reaction to the 'zombie' drug Black Mamba. Cutting-edge documentary following the work of the Staffordshire Police force(n)

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar
programme.desc: Pro driver Shane Lynch takes on engineer Ralph Hosier and his teams of mechanics, who are aiming to prove a supercar can be beaten by homemade scrap. programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actress Sheridan Smith, who went from singing with her parents in the working men's clubs near their North Lincolnshire home to successful stage performances in Little Shop of Horrors and Legally Blonde - not to mention her countless TV appearances - embarks on a journey to find out where her family's musical talents come from. She is soon hot on the trail of her great-great-grandfather Benjamin Doubleday, a world-class banjo player and musical impresario - but she is surprised by his change in fortunes(n)

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Food writer Mary Berry is one of Britain's best-loved TV cooks, finding fame thanks to her judging role on The Great British Bake Off. A self-confessed go-getter, she wants to trace her family tree to know where she gets her energy and drive from. The journey begins in Bath, where Mary grew up, and takes her to Norwich, where both her grandparents lived. Along the way she uncovers ancestors including a bankrupt book-binder, a self-motivated corset-maker and a third who worked in a much more familiar profession(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavate the cemetery in a field beside the Royal Hospital Haslar in Gosport, Hampshire - a naval institution that was built in the 18th century and closed its doors in 2009. The team uncovers multiple burials and analyses the remains, providing an insight into the life of a Georgian seaman, and building a picture of how and why the men were buried without headstones or records. Presented by Tony Robinson(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Tony Robinson, Mick Aston and Phil Harding follow digs around the UK that uncover an array of ancient artefacts and provide insights into the Viking way of life. The Norsemen had a reputation as fearsome, axe-wielding warriors, but as the team visits sites in Orkney, York and on the south coast, it becomes apparent they were also successful global traders and mariners, as well as technological pioneers(n)

programme.title: The British Middle Class
programme.desc: Historian and broadcaster Tristram Hunt examines the social class's origins. He discovers how the backlash against the landed aristocracy began with a group of radical thinkers who craved progress and used their money from industry to begin a process of urban enlightenment. However, the growth of mass production led the newly moneyed leaders to move further away from the factories, beginning the trend for suburban living as a mark of status - though it meant the middle classes turning their back on where they came from(n)

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Inspector George Gently and The Professionals star Martin Shaw is the latest celebrity to go in search of his roots, and he's particularly interested in finding out more about his paternal grandfather Edwin, who was rarely spoken about by his family. The actor has only one photo of his ancestor, which shows him aged roughly 17 and wearing a military uniform. By zooming in on the picture, Martin's brother was able to identify their grandfather's badge, which suggests he was in the Royal Marines. Now, by meeting with a military historian, Martin tries to fill in the rest of the story, and in the process learns more about Edwin's role in defending Birmingham against German air assaults during the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: DJ, actor and presenter Reggie Yates sets out to trace his ancestry. His mother and father were both born in Ghana, but he never knew his grandparents, and he is keen to know where his surname comes from, believing it might be Dutch. However, as he looks further back, his family tree springs some unexpected surprises(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team are given access to Westminster Abbey as the Cosmati pavement is revealed for the first time in 100 years. The huge mosaic floor in front of the altar, at the centre of which the Coronation Chair is placed, is usually covered by a carpet. The programme also follows a night-time search under the floors for lost tombs and graves, as well as the 1,000-year-old faked documents that gave the Abbey the right to host the Coronation(n)

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Four decades ago, Neasden-born model and actress Twiggy, then known as Lesley Hornby, found her life transformed when a reporter spotted her photo on the wall of a London hairdresser, and she was dubbed the 'face of the 60s'. Suddenly the 16-year-old was catapulted into life as a supermodel, travelling the world, mixing with some of its biggest stars and eventually appearing in films such as The Boyfriend and The Blues Brothers. However, proving the Mafia's involvement depends on a number of unreliable or unavailable witnesses. Dennis Farina and Jesse L Martin star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the rape of an actress on stage during an interactive theatre production, only to discover the people in the audience - including her assailant - were all wearing masks. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Meet the Trumps: From Immigrant to President
programme.desc: Donald Trump is the 45th President of the United States and commander in chief of America's armed forces, the most powerful position in the world. This documentary goes back to his roots, to reveal the story of his family. It reveals how Trump's penniless German grandfather arrived in America in the 1880s, and ended up running bars and brothels in the gold rush. And how his Scottish mother travelled from the Outer Hebrides to New York and worked as a maid before marrying Donald's tycoon father(n)

The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation.
